lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Oh, hellow adventurer. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: This is the prison of Zalcano.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Zalcano?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: That's right. She's a powerful demon, one bearing an ancient curse.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A curse? That doesn't sound good.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Don't worry, the curse only affects her. Because of it, her entire body has been turned to stone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So why is she here?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: She came to our lands long ago, before the curse had fully taken hold. We imprisoned her here for study, so that we might learn more about her affliction.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: If you want to learn more, you should be able to find a book in the Grand Library about her.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do here?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Well we could always use some help in keeping Zalcano under control.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I do that?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Zalcano is formed completely from stone. Because of this, normal weapons won't work on her.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: That said, when she's vulnerable, you can still do some damage to her if you use a pickaxe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When she's vulnerable? How do I make her vulnerable?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: The ore found within these caverns can be rather volatile, especially when heated. We've found that when imbued, this ore can damage her armour.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: You'll want to head on in and mine the ore from the rocks around the prison. Once you have some, you can heat it using the furnace and then imbue it using the altar.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Once you've got some imbued ore, just give it a throw her way and she'll definitely feel it.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I get for helping out here?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Well assuming you are successful of subdueing Zalcano, she has accumulated a lot of ores and magical runes from her time as a demon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not bad, what if I didn't want these resource? Is there anything you can give me instead?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Well we would always appreciate these resources, in exchange we could bestow upon you our elven knowledge for mining.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: We wouldn't be asking for anything special though, just the common resources are what we require.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: We won't take any resources from your successes, the resources are all your own.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: We will automatically collect the resources and bestow you with our elven mining knowledge.

lines.speaker: Rhiannon
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.
